description.value:
Challenge-phrases copied from wyrm-hunters — Ormstunga wyrm-hunters speak a formal challenge before a kill that compels the creature to fix its attention; the phrase etched into a blade carries the same compulsion, binding a struck enemy's focus to the weapon that struck it.

Effect: Once per encounter, when you hit a creature with a strike using this weapon, you can mark it until the end of the encounter. Your strikes against a marked creature gain an edge.

Rules: Mark; Edge; Strike; Encounter.

project.prerequisites: A weapon of at least quality craft; a wyrm-hunter's formal challenge transcribed in Ormstunga
